content.en:
Rumble!!!

A breath that many ancestors could not imagine filled this hall.

What came was just a phantom shadow of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, but it was still not an existence that these Great Ancestors present could compete with, which showed how terrifying the real Heavenly Ancestor was, and he could annihilate them at will.

"I've seen Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor!"

Many Great Ancestors said respectfully.

After scanning around, Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor said, "This time, I will send you into the Evil Blue Land, and you must gather 10,000 contribution points before you can leave." The more contribution points, the more rewards you will get. The time is the first year of the ten realms, and after the first year of the ten realms, you will leave the land of evil blue, and if you don't collect 10,000 contribution points, there will be no reward!"

As soon as the words fell, a cloud of information merged into the bodies of many great ancestors.

This information contains information on how the contribution was earned.

"Killing a Stage 4 high-level immeasurable lifeform will give you 10 contribution points, killing a stage 5 high-level immeasurable lifeform will give you 1000 contribution points, and collecting a blue crystal will give you 100 contribution points......"

After Ye Tian obtained this information, his expression was extremely solemn.

Killing a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform is only 1,000 contribution points, and if you want to make up 10,000 contributions, it is worth killing ten fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!

There are only a few high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fifth stage in the entire Xuanqi Realm, and there are definitely not many of them, and each of them is a true top existence, suppressing a supreme powerhouse of a top force.

However, here there is a fight to the death.

"No, the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms who dare to enter here are afraid that they all have many life-saving means, and the life-saving means similar to the Golden God Armor Stone are estimated to be nothing, and it is difficult for them to be killed by each other. If you want to get enough contribution points, you have to collect enough materials, such as the Blue Crystal, one is 100 contribution points, and 100 are enough!"

Ye Tian secretly guessed.

If the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms were really so easy to kill, then the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms would not come here easily, and the number would not be so large.

However, when the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage entered here, it was really ten deaths and no life.

Ye Tian's current strength is estimated to be inferior to the other two fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, no wonder the other Great Ancestors think that he will definitely die this time.

However, Ye Tian didn't feel that he was going to die, he still had hope of living.

......

"Give you a little time to prepare, and when you're ready, I'll teleport you there!"

After saying that, Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor left.

After Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor left, some Great Ancestors showed solemn expressions.

"I didn't expect that this time it was actually the land of evil blue, and the competition was very fierce!"

A fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform sighed.

"Yes, the last time I entered the Evil Blue Land, it was eighteen years ago in the Infinite Realm Yuan Years, and that time I could have fallen a lot of high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fifth stage!"

"Hey, I knew it was the Evil Blue Land, so I won't come this time!"

"Hehe, now that it's all here, if you dare to leave, Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor will definitely kill you!"

Ye Tian listened to their conversation, and there were many doubts in his heart.

Obviously, they knew something about the Badlands, not like he didn't.

"Ancestors, what is the place of the Evil Blue Land?"

Ye Tian asked.

However, some fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms just glanced at Ye Tian and directly ignored them.

Maybe for them, Ye Tian is a dead man, what is there to talk about with a dead man.

However, in the end, there was still a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform named Pale Great Ancestor who answered Ye Tian's words.

"The Evil Blue Lands is a mysterious place, and we don't know where the distance is. We only know that many Heavenly Ancestors are fighting against the idea of the Evil Blue Land, and every long time they will send a group of Great Ancestors into it. Those Celestial Ancestors may be for the resources of the Evil Blue Lands, or maybe it's just a game. However, as long as he came out of the Evil Blue Land alive and collected 10,000 contribution points, he could get a huge opportunity from Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor. "

The Pale Great Ancestor said a lot, so that Ye Tian had an understanding of the Evil Blue Land, and also knew a little about the secrets of the token.

"I didn't expect that after getting the token, the so-called chance turned out to be this!"

Ye Tian frowned.

It seems that many Great Ancestors only know that this token involves the fate of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, but they don't know what chance it is, if they know, they will definitely not want to come.

What kind of chance is this, it's clearly a mercenary token!

I'm afraid that it's not just Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor who is doing this, these Heavenly Ancestors use various methods to summon some fourth- or fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms to do things for them, so as to obtain some resources that they don't need.

Even if these Great Ancestors fell, for Yinheng Heavenly Ancestors, there would be no loss.

But even so, there are still many high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fifth stage.

As for the reason, it is naturally for the treasures and resources.

At the fifth stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform level, the general resources are useless to them, and if they want to get a breakthrough opportunity, they can only try, and it is naturally worth taking some risks.

This time the Evil Blue Land is a little dangerous, but the rest of the time it is quite safe.

It can only be said that the great ancestors present were a little unlucky this time.

"Sure enough, there is no cheap thing to pick up for nothing, Yinheng Tianzu throws tokens everywhere, and he has no good intentions at all!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, when he came, he naturally wanted to give it a go, and maybe he could get benefits from Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor!

Time passed slowly, and many Great Ancestors were ready.

Abrupt.

A force enveloped here, and many Great Ancestors were directly removed.

......

Rumble!!!!

A heaven and earth were torn apart, and figures were thrown in, scattered all over this piece of heaven and earth.

And Ye Tian was also thrown in, and he landed in a mountain range.

As soon as he threw it in, he immediately used various concealment methods to perfectly hide his aura.

In terms of strength, he was definitely the last here, so fighting these fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms now was undoubtedly an act of seeking death.

Airplanes!

The copy talent shrouded in all directions.

Soon, Ye Tian sensed a creature that was comparable to the third stage.

So, Ye Tian instantly killed the other party, and then began to copy the other party's body.

He wants to copy a native creature of the Evil Blue Land, and one more copy body will give him one more chance!

Mainly the creatures of the third stage, those foreign ancestors are probably not interested in killing, so they are not easy to fall.

After this creature was copied, Ye Tian began to prepare for the next action!
